query: SELECT id, title, LEFT(audioUrl, 50) as audio_url_preview, LEFT(lyrics, 50) as lyrics_preview, sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL as has_sheet FROM songs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 18;
